subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1912-09-20
subcodes.first_line: In this country it is essential to have teachers who are attracted, wholly severed and learned like some of the self-sacrificing Persian teachers.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بجهت این بلاد مبلغ منجذب منقطع و عالم بسیار واجب است مثل بعضی از مبلغین جانفشان ایران
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
